one_liner: CELH +4.05% to $33.16 continuing the technical bounce from Phase A-B accumulation; DCF $44.40 (25.3% MoS) supports the setup but no specific catalyst today.

price_action.intraday_story: CELH gap open and grind higher all session on near-average volume. Phase A-B accumulation with the May 7 SC (3.29x) as the structural low. Today's close at $33.16 is the highest since the July 1 bounce.

valuation.summary: DCF $44.40 vs $33.16 = 25.3% MoS. Bear case $22.74 below current. Accumulation thesis supported by multiple analyst Buy ratings with $58-62 mean target.

risks: No catalyst today — technical bounce vulnerable to reversal
18 Buy ratings vs $31 stock price suggests ongoing execution concern
